name: Log Tail
description: Shows the last 50 lines of a log file
author: AgentOS

steps.description: Tail the last 50 lines of a log file
steps.command: $logPath = "$env:USERPROFILE\AppData\Local\AgentOS\agentos.log"; if (Test-Path $logPath) { Get-Content $logPath -Tail 50 } else { Write-Output "Log file not found at $logPath. Specify the correct path." }
